---
title: "NBA Draft Analysis"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme:
      version: 5
      bootswatch:
      base_font: "Inter"
      code_font: "JetBrains Mono"
runtime: shiny
---

```{r global, include=FALSE}
library(pxR)
library(MASS)
library(shinydashboard)
library(datasets)
library(highcharter)
library(fpp3)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(openxlsx)
library(leaflet)
library(geojsonio)
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(splines)

# Evitar conflictos entre librerías
select    <- dplyr::select
mutate    <- dplyr::mutate
filter    <- dplyr::filter
group_by  <- dplyr::group_by
summarise <- dplyr::summarise
selectInput <- shiny::selectInput
```

```{r helpers, include=FALSE}
# Transformación Yeo-Johnson
yeo.johnson <- function(y, lambda) {
  y_t <- numeric(length(y))
  pos_idx <- which(y >= 0)
  if (lambda == 0) {
    y_t[pos_idx] <- log(y[pos_idx] + 1)
  } else {
    y_t[pos_idx] <- ((y[pos_idx] + 1)^lambda - 1) / lambda
  }
  neg_idx <- which(y < 0)
  if (lambda == 2) {
    y_t[neg_idx] <- -log(-y[neg_idx] + 1)
  } else {
    y_t[neg_idx] <- -(((-y[neg_idx] + 1)^(2 - lambda) - 1) / (2 - lambda))
  }
  return(y_t)
}

# Lambda óptimo para Yeo-Johnson maximizando R²
optimize.yeojohnson.R2 <- function(x, y, lambda_range = c(-1, 1.9)) {
  r2_neg <- function(lambda) {
    y_t <- yeo.johnson(y, lambda)
    modelo <- lm(y_t ~ x)
    return(-summary(modelo)$r.squared)
  }
  opt <- optimize(r2_neg, interval = lambda_range)
  return(opt$minimum)
}

# Valor de Pareto
ParetoValue <- function(v, ParetoSignificancia) {
  x <- sort(v, decreasing = TRUE)
  return(x[which(cumsum(x) >= ParetoSignificancia * sum(x))[1]])
}

# Colores por categoría de rank
rank_levels <- c("Generational", "SuperStar", "Star", "Elite",
                 "Starter", "Solid", "Role", "Rotation", "Deep")

rank_colors <- c(
  "Generational" = "#FFD700",
  "SuperStar"    = "#FF6B35",
  "Star"         = "#E63946",
  "Elite"        = "#457B9D",
  "Starter"      = "#1D3557",
  "Solid"        = "#2D6A4F",
  "Role"         = "#74C69D",
  "Rotation"     = "#A8DADC",
  "Deep"         = "#CED4DA"
)
```

```{r data, include=FALSE}
untidyData <- readr::read_csv("untidyData.csv")
tidyData   <- readr::read_csv("tidyData.csv")
```


Overall
==============================

Column {.sidebar data-width=220}
------------------------------

```{r}
selectInput(
  "year",
  label   = "Draft Year:",
  choices = sort(unique(tidyData$year)),
  selected = 2003
)
```

---

**NBA Draft Analysis**

Explora el rendimiento histórico de los jugadores drafteados, compara el pick original con el redraft basado en performance real, y analiza la composición de talento por franquicia.

Row {data-height=450}
---------------------

### 🏀 Talento por Equipo

```{r}
highcharter::renderHighchart({
  team_rank_data <- tidyData %>%
    filter(year == input$year) %>%
    distinct(player, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    group_by(team, rank) %>%
    summarise(
      n       = n(),
      players = paste(player, collapse = ", "),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(team) %>%
    mutate(rank = factor(rank, levels = rank_levels))

  all_teams <- sort(unique(team_rank_data$team))

  series_data <- lapply(rank_levels, function(r) {
    counts <- team_rank_data %>% filter(rank == r)
    
    data_list <- lapply(all_teams, function(t) {
      row <- counts %>% filter(team == t)
      if (nrow(row) == 0) {
        list(y = 0, players = "")
      } else {
        list(y = row$n, players = row$players)
      }
    })

    list(
      name  = r,
      data  = data_list,
      color = rank_colors[[r]]
    )
  })

  highchart() %>%
    hc_chart(type = "bar", style = list(fontFamily = "Inter, sans-serif")) %>%
    hc_title(
      text  = paste0("<b>Selección de Talento Drafteado por Equipo — ", input$year, "</b>"),
      style = list(fontSize = "18px", color = "#1D3557")
    ) %>%
    hc_subtitle(
      text  = "Distribución de categorías de rendimiento por franquicia",
      style = list(fontSize = "13px", color = "#6c757d")
    ) %>%
    hc_xAxis(
      categories = all_teams,
      title      = list(text = NULL),
      labels     = list(style = list(fontSize = "11px"))
    ) %>%
    hc_plotOptions(
      bar = list(
        stacking     = "normal",
        borderWidth  = 0,
        pointPadding = 0.05,
        groupPadding = 0.03
      )
    ) %>%
    hc_add_series_list(series_data) %>%
    hc_legend(
      align         = "right",
      verticalAlign = "middle",
      layout        = "vertical",
      title         = list(text = "Categoría"),
      itemStyle     = list(fontSize = "11px")
    ) %>%
    hc_tooltip(
      useHTML   = TRUE,
      formatter = JS("
        function() {
          if (this.point.y === 0) return false;
          return '<b>' + this.key + '</b><br/>' +
                 '<span style=\"color:' + this.series.color + '\">●</span> ' +
                 this.series.name + ': <b>' + this.point.y + '</b> jugadores<br/>' +
                 '<hr style=\"margin:4px 0\"/>' +
                 this.point.players;
        }
      ")
    ) %>%
    hc_add_theme(hc_theme_smpl())
})
```

Row {data-height=550}
---------------------

### 🔄 Re-Draft

```{r}
highcharter::renderHighchart({

  top_redraft <- untidyData %>%
    filter(year == input$year) %>%
    distinct(player, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    arrange(newPick)

  hchart(top_redraft, "scatter",
         hcaes(x = as.numeric(overall_pick), y = newPick, group = rank)) %>%
    hc_title(
      text  = paste0("<b>Re-Draft ", input$year, "</b>"),
      style = list(fontSize = "18px", color = "#1D3557")
    ) %>%
    hc_subtitle(
      text  = "Pick original vs. pick basado en rendimiento real",
      style = list(fontSize = "13px", color = "#6c757d")
    ) %>%
    hc_xAxis(
      title = list(text = "Pick Original", style = list(fontWeight = "bold")),
      min = 1, max = 60,
      plotLines = list(list(
        value = 30, color = "#cccccc", dashStyle = "Dash", width = 1
      ))
    ) %>%
    hc_yAxis(
      title    = list(text = "Nuevo Pick (Performance Real)", style = list(fontWeight = "bold")),
      reversed = TRUE,
      min = 1, max = 60,
      plotLines = list(list(
        value = 30, color = "#cccccc", dashStyle = "Dash", width = 1
      ))
    ) %>%
    hc_tooltip(
      useHTML     = TRUE,
      pointFormat = "
        <b>{point.player}</b><br/>
        Pick Original: <b>{point.x}</b><br/>
        Nuevo Pick: <b>{point.y}</b><br/>
        Diferencia: <b>{point.pickDifference}</b>
      "
    ) %>%
    hc_plotOptions(
      scatter = list(
        marker = list(radius = 6, symbol = "circle"),
        states = list(hover = list(enabled = TRUE))
      )
    ) %>%
    hc_legend(
      align         = "right",
      verticalAlign = "middle",
      layout        = "vertical",
      title         = list(text = "Categoría"),
      itemStyle     = list(fontSize = "11px")
    ) %>%
    hc_chart(style = list(fontFamily = "Inter, sans-serif")) %>%
    hc_add_theme(hc_theme_smpl())
})
```

### 🔥 Lottery Picks Heatmap

```{r}
highcharter::renderHighchart({

    lottery_picks <- tidyData %>%
    filter(year == input$year, unit == "Player") %>%
    distinct(player, overall_pick) %>%
    arrange(overall_pick) %>%
    head(14) %>%
    pull(player)

  df_heat <- tidyData %>%
    filter(
      year  == input$year,
      unit  == "Player",
      player %in% lottery_picks
    ) %>%
    group_by(indicator) %>%
    mutate(normValue = (value - min(value, na.rm = TRUE)) /
                       (max(value, na.rm = TRUE) - min(value, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(desc(overall_pick))
  

  hchart(df_heat, "heatmap", hcaes(x = indicator, y = player, value = normValue)) %>%
    hc_colorAxis(
      min   = 0,
      max   = 1,
      stops = color_stops(7, c("#313695", "#74add1", "#ffffbf", "#f46d43", "#d73027"))
    ) %>%
    hc_title(
      text  = paste0("<b>Heatmap de Atributos — Elite del Draft ", input$year, "</b>"),
      style = list(fontSize = "18px", color = "#1D3557")
    ) %>%
    hc_subtitle(
      text  = "Picks de Lotería — valores normalizados [0, 1]",
      style = list(fontSize = "13px", color = "#6c757d")
    ) %>%
    hc_xAxis(
      title  = list(text = NULL),
      labels = list(rotation = -45, style = list(fontSize = "10px"))
    ) %>%
    hc_yAxis(
      title  = list(text = NULL),
      labels = list(style = list(fontSize = "11px"))
    ) %>%
    hc_plotOptions(
      heatmap = list(
        borderWidth = 2,
        borderColor = "#ffffff",
        nullColor   = "#f0f0f0",
        states      = list(
          hover = list(enabled = TRUE, brightness = 0)
        )
      )
    ) %>%
    hc_tooltip(
      useHTML   = TRUE,
      formatter = JS("
        function() {
          return '<b>' + this.point.player + '</b><br/>' +
                 'Atributo: <b>' + this.point.indicator + '</b><br/>' +
                 'Valor norm.: <b>' + Math.round(this.point.value * 100) / 100 + '</b>';
        }
      ")
    ) %>%
    hc_chart(
      marginLeft   = 160,
      marginBottom = 110,
      marginRight  = 60,
      style        = list(fontFamily = "Inter, sans-serif"),
      animation    = list(duration = 0)
    ) %>%
    hc_add_theme(hc_theme_smpl())
})
```
